PS C:\Users\aaron\Desktop\tmp\dk_stuff\inputs\tmp> ..\..\..\..\dkpak.exe -userpak
dkpak must now be run from from the /src/data directory
The output will be written to
   ../../dst/base
   ../../dst/models
   ../../dst/maps
Which represent the components used by the InstallShield project


File Size  - 256 261
Compressed - .\maps/random.bsp (0 percent)
Adding file - maps/random.bsp
Adding file - notes.txt
